name: Tour de France Fan Park and Ateliers du Tour - Bordeaux
summary: Official free Tour de France Fan Park at Place des Quinconces on July 9 and July 10.
whyItMatters: This gives the Bordeaux stage a confirmed official fan-zone option with live race feed on the finish day.
pros: Official ASO/Tour event with free admission
Central Bordeaux location near tram hub Quinconces
Open on both the Pyrenees viewing day evening and the Bordeaux finish day
Includes giant-screen race feed, partner activities, learn-to-ride track, DJ set, and Thursday concert
cons: Finish-day access may be affected by Stage 7 city-center security and road closures
Official Fan Park page does not give Bordeaux-specific transit disruption details
Potentially high crowds at Place des Quinconces

logistics.reservation_needed: No; official source says free admission
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Depends on final selected Bordeaux finish viewing point; Place des Quinconces is central
logistics.transit: Check TBM service notices close to July 10; Quinconces is a major tram/bus hub under normal operations
logistics.parking: Unknown; avoid assuming car access near the finish and Fan Park
logistics.road_closure_notes: Stage 7 enters Bordeaux via Pont Simone Veil and finishes in Bordeaux per the official Tour timetable; city access plans need official Bordeaux/TBM follow-up.

timing.best_visit_window: Thu Jul 9 afternoon/evening if arriving from the Pyrenees, or Fri Jul 10 before the finish if transit is confirmed

sources.title: Tour de France - Fan Parks and Les Ateliers du Tour
sources.note: Official ASO page confirming Bordeaux Fan Park location, free admission, opening dates/hours, and programme.

sources.title: Tour de France Stage 7 - Hagetmau > Bordeaux
sources.note: Official stage page showing the Bordeaux approach, Pont Simone Veil, Bordeaux entry, and expected finish timing.

sources.title: TBM - Bordeaux public transport official website
sources.note: Official Bordeaux transit operator to monitor for tram/bus disruptions around Place des Quinconces and the finish.

open_questions: Will TBM publish a Tour-specific tram/bus notice for July 10?
Where exactly is the Stage 7 finish line relative to Place des Quinconces and which pedestrian routes will remain open?
